name: Prism
when_to_use: 需要稳定高亮长代码、嵌套语法或多段代码时用它,而非手写 token span——原生手写在字符串/注释嵌套、转义和跨语言文法上会失败。非做可编辑代码编辑器或代码执行器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能给短片段做约 80% 的手工着色;长代码、多语言与嵌套 token 会错分且难保持主题一致,Prism 文法确定性产出分类 span。

data_in.note: 根入口只保证内置 markup/css/clike/javascript 文法;其他语言须另载对应 components/prism-<lang> 模块,本条不假定已载入。

schema.code: string —— 原始源码文本,不要预转义 HTML

carriers.widget: conditional:需 fetch 主题 CSS 并注入 shadow;JS 只在目标 code 节点产出 span,无 worker/wasm
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + iframe head 主题 CSS

isolation.evidence: STYLE=no:core 实测无 document.head/createElement("style")注入,主题 CSS 为外置文件(boot 手动:artifact 进 head、widget fetch 进 shadow)。EVENTS=yes:import 时经 requestAnimationFrame / document DOMContentLoaded 调度 highlightAll(实测守卫存在且 ESM 下 manual=false),未清理。DOM=yes:该 highlightAll 会 querySelectorAll(document) 扫描并改写 light DOM 内 code.language-* 节点(不触及 shadow 内容,但属全局副作用)。shadowCompatible=conditional:highlight() 产出 span 与主题 CSS 在 shadow 内工作完好,唯 import 期自动 highlightAll 是未隔离的全局行为(可用 Prism.manual=true 抑制)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need stable highlighting for long code, nested syntax, or multiple code blocks, instead of hand-writing token spans, because native implementations fail at nested strings/comments, escaping, and cross-language grammars. Not an editable code editor or code executor.
en.why_valuable: AI can only hand-color short snippets to about 80% accuracy by default. Long code, multiple languages, and nested tokens are misclassified and themes are hard to keep consistent; Prism grammars deterministically produce classified spans.

data_in.note: The root entry guarantees only the built-in markup/css/clike/javascript grammars. Other languages require loading the corresponding components/prism-<lang> module separately; this entry does not assume they are loaded.

schema.code: string -- Raw source text; do not pre-escape HTML
